headline: **MLB Daily Recap: May 3, 2026**
article:
The Minnesota Twins edged out the Toronto Blue Jays 4-3 in a closely contested game, with Kazuma Okamoto leading the Blue Jays' offense. The Houston Astros secured a 3-1 victory over the Boston Red Sox, with Bryan Abreu earning the win. The Cincinnati Reds suffered a 0-1 loss to the Pittsburgh Pirates, with Chase Burns leading the way for the Pirates on the mound.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, including Yusei Kikuchi of the Los Angeles Angels, who has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to left shoulder inflammation. The New York Mets have also placed Ronny Mauricio on the 10-day injured list with a left thumb fracture. Other notable injuries include Germán Márquez of the San Diego Padres, Ronald Acuña Jr. of the Atlanta Braves, Will Wilson of the Seattle Mariners, Cole Sands of the Minnesota Twins, Matt Brash of the Seattle Mariners, and Ryan Helsley of the Baltimore Orioles.

The Detroit Tigers have made a trade, acquiring infielder Zack Short from the Washington Nationals in exchange for cash. The Los Angeles Dodgers have also made a trade, acquiring second baseman Tyler Fitzgerald from the Toronto Blue Jays for cash. Additionally, the Toronto Blue Jays have traded catcher Willie MacIver to the Texas Rangers for cash, and the Seattle Mariners have traded right-hander Casey Legumina to the Tampa Bay Rays for right-hander Ty Cummings.

top_news.title: **Twins Take Down Blue Jays in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Minnesota Twins edged out the Toronto Blue Jays 4-3 in a closely contested game. Kazuma Okamoto led the Blue Jays' offense with a home run and two RBIs.

top_news.title: **Astros Take Down Red Sox 3-1**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros secured a 3-1 victory over the Boston Red Sox, with Bryan Abreu earning the win.

top_news.title: **Reds Fall Short in Pittsburgh**
top_news.summary: The Cincinnati Reds suffered a 0-1 loss to the Pittsburgh Pirates, with Chase Burns leading the way for the Pirates on the mound. Burns pitched 7.0 innings, striking out 7 batters and allowing 0 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Yankees Rout Orioles 11-3**
top_news.summary: The New York Yankees dominated the Baltimore Orioles, winning 11-3 behind a strong team effort. Jasson Domínguez led the Orioles with 3 hits, 1 home run, and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Kikuchi Lands on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Los Angeles Angels left-hander Yusei Kikuchi has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to left shoulder inflammation, retroactive to April 30, 2026.

top_news.title: **Tigers Acquire Zack Short in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Detroit Tigers have acquired infielder Zack Short from the Washington Nationals in exchange for cash.
